title: Channel Factories
description: Channel factories let multiple users share one on-chain UTXO to open and rebalance many off-chain channels. They trade coordination complexity for better on-chain footprint and liquidity efficiency.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Channel Factories
resources.notes: Design tradeoffs and status of factory-based channel constructions.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts Tag: Channel factories
resources.notes: Primary-source discussions from Lightning protocol workshops.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Lightning channel design patterns and protocol internals.
